narrative:
Green Camp Twp. township has 747 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.8 percentage points.
